subject: [PATCH v1 3/9] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying from ring

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic for copying headers from a ring in the fuse kernel module to make it more clear and centralized. It introduces a new function, copy_header_from_ring(), which handles the actual copying of data from user space to kernel space. This change improves error handling and rate-limited logging. The existing code is updated to use this new function instead of directly calling copy_from_user().
